sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Susquehanna Upgrades GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) to Strong-Buy
feed.summary: Susquehanna has upgraded GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) to a "strong-buy" rating after the company beat quarterly earnings expectations. Other firms like RBC, Bank of America, and Wolfe Research also raised their price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $304.31. GE Aerospace reported $1.66 EPS against an expected $1.46, with revenues up 26.4% year-over-year, and set strong FY2025 guidance.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Downgraded to Hold Rating by Baird R W
feed.summary: Baird R W has downgraded Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) to a "hold" rating from a "strong-buy" on Friday. This comes after Synchrony reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $2.86 and revenue of $3.82 billion, and authorized a $1.0 billion stock buyback. Despite the downgrade, the consensus rating from analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $81.41.

feed.title: Evaluating KHC Stock's Actual Performance
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ: KHC) has consistently underperformed the market despite owning many familiar brands and offering a high-yield dividend. The company's portfolio is largely mature, with products that no longer appeal to evolving consumer tastes, leading to stagnant revenue growth. Management plans to split the company into two businesses, but the author is skeptical this will address the core issues.

feed.title: TD Cowen Reiterates Buy on AMD, Calls Helios a Major AI Inflection Point
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reiterated a "Buy" rating on Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) with a $290 price target, identifying it as a top AI stock. The firm believes AMD's "Helios" AI rack-scale architecture will be a major AI inflection point, establishing the company as a winner in the AI compute market. Despite concerns about a volatile AI spending environment, analysts see the recent pullback in shares as an attractive entry point ahead of the Helios launch, predicting significant EPS growth.

feed.title: Biocon to absorb biologics unit, eyes Rs 4,500 cr fund raise to buy Viatris’s residual stake
feed.summary: Biocon announced its plan to fully integrate its biosimilars arm, Biocon Biologics Limited (BBL), into the parent company. This strategic move aims to simplify the corporate structure, strengthen the balance sheet, and create a unified biopharma powerhouse focused on diabetes, oncology, and immunology. To fund the acquisition of Viatris's residual stake, Biocon intends to raise Rs 4,500 crore through QIP and bridge loans.

feed.title: Constellation Energy agrees to divest interest in Gregory Power Plant
feed.summary: As part of an antitrust settlement, Constellation Energy Corp. Inc. has agreed to divest its ownership interest in several power plants, including the Gregory Power Plant and the Jack A. Fusco Energy Center in Texas. This divestiture is aimed at resolving antitrust concerns raised by the U.S. Department of Justice and the attorney general of Texas regarding Constellation's $26.6 billion acquisition of Calpine Corp. The acquisition was believed to risk harming millions of electricity consumers by potentially leading to higher electricity prices.
